items.title: Grafana GitHub Token Breach Led to Codebase Download and Extortion Attempt
items.summary:
Grafana has disclosed that an "unauthorized party" obtained a token that granted them the ability to access the company's GitHub environment and download its codebase.

items.title: Microsoft rejects critical Azure vulnerability report, no CVE issued
items.summary: A security researcher claims Microsoft quietly fixed an Azure Backup for AKS vulnerability after rejecting his report, and without issuing a CVE. Microsoft disputes the claim, telling BleepingComputer the behavior was ex...
